Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIyNDE3NTllMy03ZWRkLTRmNmUtYTFhNS0wYjQxYmQyNGE5ODUiLCJlbWFpbCI6InRlc3RAZXhhbXBsZS5jb20iLCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNjg5ODQ2LCJleHAiOjE3NzM2OTE2NDYsImp0aSI6IjlkZWFiZTZlYzYwMDNhMmJmMmIzYTZlYzIzN2M1NmMyIn0.pkbR7Pze7STO4okwIV0oD2a_6hutHTUYIRm3mvcB4qI"
RUN_ID="d170d998-a6a8-452f-8724-228c3463fa1b"

curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jobs/$RUN_ID" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Status:', d.get\('status'\)\)
print\(\)

app = d.get\('reports', {}\).get\('application', {}\)
print\('========== INTERVIEW PREP TAB =========='\)
print\(\)

ip = app.get\('interview_process', []\)
print\(f'Interview Process: {len\(ip\)} stages'\)
for s in ip:
    print\(f'  [{s.get\(\\"format\\",\\"\\"\)}] {s.get\(\\"stage\\",\\"\\"\)} — {s.get\(\\"who\\",\\"\\"\)} \({s.get\(\\"duration\\",\\"\\"\)}\)'\)
    print\(f'       {s.get\(\\"what_to_expect\\",\\"\\"\)[:120]}'\)
print\(\)

qb = app.get\('question_bank', {}\)
beh = qb.get\('behavioural', []\)
print\(f'Behavioural Questions: {len\(beh\)}'\)
for q in beh[:3]:
    print\(f'  Q: {q.get\(\\"question\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Why: {q.get\(\\"why_they_ask\\",\\"\\"\)[:100]}'\)
    print\(f'  Story: {q.get\(\\"your_story\\",\\"\\"\)[:100]}'\)
    print\(f'  Points: {q.get\(\\"key_points\\",[]\)}'\)
    print\(\)

bc = qb.get\('business_case', []\)
print\(f'Business Case Questions: {len\(bc\)}'\)
for q in bc[:2]:
    print\(f'  Q: {q.get\(\\"question\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Type: {q.get\(\\"case_type\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)
    print\(\)

sit = qb.get\('situational', []\)
cul = qb.get\('culture_and_motivation', []\)
print\(f'Situational: {len\(sit\)}, Culture: {len\(cul\)}'\)
print\(\)

qta = app.get\('questions_to_ask_them', []\)
print\(f'Questions to Ask Them: {len\(qta\)}'\)
for q in qta[:3]:
    print\(f'  \\"{q.get\(\\"question\\",\\"\\"\)}\\"'\)
    print\(f'  Why: {q.get\(\\"why_powerful\\",\\"\\"\)[:100]}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIyNDE3NTllMy03ZWRkLTRmNmUtYTFhNS0wYjQxYmQyNGE5ODUiLCJlbWFpbCI6InRlc3RAZXhhbXBsZS5jb20iLCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNjg5ODQ2LCJleHAiOjE3NzM2OTE2NDYsImp0aSI6IjlkZWFiZTZlYzYwMDNhMmJmMmIzYTZlYzIzN2M1NmMyIn0.pkbR7Pze7STO4okwIV0oD2a_6hutHTUYIRm3mvcB4qI"
RUN_ID="d170d998-a6a8-452f-8724-228c3463fa1b"

curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jobs/$RUN_ID" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

print\('========== STRENGTHS & GAPS TAB =========='\)
pos = d.get\('positioning'\)
if pos:
    print\(f'Headline: {pos.get\(\\"positioning_headline\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'Narrative: {pos.get\(\\"narrative_thread\\",\\"\\"\)[:200]}'\)
    print\(\)
    for a in pos.get\('strongest_angles', []\):
        print\(f'  Angle: {a.get\(\\"angle\\"\) or a.get\(\\"title\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'  Why: {\(a.get\(\\"why_it_matters_here\\"\) or a.get\(\\"explanation\\",\\"\\"\)\)[:120]}'\)
        print\(f'  Play it: {a.get\(\\"how_to_play_it\\",\\"\\"\)[:120]}'\)
        print\(\)
    for g in pos.get\('gaps_to_address', []\):
        print\(f'  [{g.get\(\\"severity\\"\)}] {g.get\(\\"gap\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'    Fix: {g.get\(\\"mitigation\\",\\"\\"\)[:120]}'\)
else:
    print\('No positioning data — Strengths tab requires a Profile.'\)
    print\('\(CV-only runs skip the PositioningStrategy LLM call\)'\)
    print\(\)
    print\('To test: create a profile with experiences, then run again.'\)

print\(\)
print\('========== OTHER TABS =========='\)
r = d.get\('reports', {}\)
print\(f'Company Intel: {r.get\(\\"company\\",{}\).get\(\\"company_name\\",\\"\\"\)} — {len\(r.get\(\\"company\\",{}\).get\(\\"recent_news\\",[]\)\)} news, {len\(r.get\(\\"company\\",{}\).get\(\\"red_flags\\",[]\)\)} red flags'\)
print\(f'Salary: {len\(r.get\(\\"salary\\",[]\)\)} bands'\)
net = r.get\('networking', {}\)
print\(f'Contacts: {len\(net.get\(\\"named_contacts\\",[]\)\)} named, {len\(net.get\(\\"known_network_asks\\",[]\)\)} warm asks'\)
print\(f'Action plan: {len\(net.get\(\\"seven_day_action_plan\\",[]\)\)} days'\)
print\(f'Exec summary: {len\(r.get\(\\"exec_summary\\",[]\)\)} bullets'\)
")
